meta.label: 日常口语 B1
meta.description: 中级日常对话，涵盖情感表达、观点陈述、建议请求等场景

sentences.text: I find it difficult to express my feelings in words.
sentences.translation: 我发现很难用语言表达我的感受。
sentences.phonetic: aɪ faɪnd ɪt ˈdɪfɪkəlt tuː ɪkˈsprɛs maɪ ˈfiːlɪŋz ɪn wɜːrdz

segments.text: to express my feelings in words

sentences.text: It is generally believed that regular exercise improves mental health.
sentences.translation: 人们普遍认为定期锻炼能改善心理健康。
sentences.phonetic: ɪt ɪz ˈdʒɛnərəli bɪˈliːvd ðæt ˈrɛɡjələr ˈɛksərsaɪz ɪmˈpruːvz ˈmɛntəl hɛlθ

sentences.text: What matters most is not how much you know but how much you care.
sentences.translation: 最重要的不是你知道多少，而是你有多在乎。
sentences.phonetic: wɑːt ˈmætərz moʊst ɪz nɑːt haʊ mʌtʃ juː noʊ bʌt haʊ mʌtʃ juː kɛr

sentences.text: Technology has changed the way we communicate with each other.
sentences.translation: 科技改变了我们彼此交流的方式。
sentences.phonetic: tɛkˈnɑːlədʒi hæz tʃeɪndʒd ðə weɪ wiː kəˈmjuːnɪkeɪt wɪð iːtʃ ˈʌðər

segments.text: the way we communicate with each other

sentences.text: Learning a new language opens doors to different cultures.
sentences.translation: 学习一门新语言打开了通往不同文化的大门。
sentences.phonetic: ˈlɜːrnɪŋ ə njuː ˈlæŋɡwɪdʒ ˈoʊpənz dɔːrz tuː ˈdɪfərənt ˈkʌltʃərz

sentences.text: She suggested that we should start the meeting earlier.
sentences.translation: 她建议我们应该提前开始会议。
sentences.phonetic: ʃiː səˈdʒɛstɪd ðæt wiː ʃʊd stɑːrt ðə ˈmiːtɪŋ ˈɜːrliər

sentences.text: He apologized for not having informed us in advance.
sentences.translation: 他为没有提前通知我们而道歉。
sentences.phonetic: hiː əˈpɑːlədʒaɪzd fɔːr nɑːt ˈhævɪŋ ɪnˈfɔrmd ʌs ɪn ædˈvæns

sentences.text: He managed to finish the project ahead of schedule.
sentences.translation: 他成功地提前完成了项目。
sentences.phonetic: hiː ˈmænɪdʒd tuː ˈfɪnɪʃ ðə ˈprɑːdʒɛkt əˈhɛd ʌv ˈskɛdʒuːl

sentences.text: The instructions were so confusing that nobody understood them.
sentences.translation: 指令太混乱了，以至于没人能理解。
sentences.phonetic: ði ɪnˈstrʌkʃənz wɜːr soʊ kənˈfjuːzɪŋ ðæt ˈnoʊbədi ˌʌndərˈstʊd ðɛm

sentences.text: The more you practice, the better you will become.
sentences.translation: 你练习得越多，你就会变得越好。
sentences.phonetic: ðə mɔːr juː ˈpræktɪs ðə ˈbɛtər juː wɪl bɪˈkʌm

sentences.text: If I had more time, I would travel around the world.
sentences.translation: 如果我有更多时间，我会环游世界。
sentences.phonetic: ɪf aɪ hæd mɔːr taɪm aɪ wʊd ˈtrævəl əˈraʊnd ðə wɜːrld

sentences.text: Despite the heavy rain, the event went on as planned.
sentences.translation: 尽管下着大雨，活动仍按计划进行。
sentences.phonetic: dɪˈspaɪt ðə ˈhɛvi reɪn ði ɪˈvɛnt wɛnt ɑːn æz plænd

sentences.text: She couldn't remember where she had put her keys.
sentences.translation: 她不记得把钥匙放哪儿了。
sentences.phonetic: ʃiː ˈkʊdənt rɪˈmɛmbər wɛr ʃiː hæd pʊt hɜːr kiːz

sentences.text: I would rather stay home than go out in this weather.
sentences.translation: 在这种天气里，我宁愿待在家里也不愿出门。
sentences.phonetic: aɪ wʊd ˈræðər steɪ hoʊm ðæn ɡoʊ aʊt ɪn ðɪs ˈwɛðər

sentences.text: The government has announced new policies to protect the environment.
sentences.translation: 政府宣布了保护环境的新政策。
sentences.phonetic: ðə ˈɡʌvərnmənt hæz əˈnaʊnst njuː ˈpɑːləsiz tuː prəˈtɛkt ði ɪnˈvaɪrənmənt
